channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Ruby (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Ruby nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 rubymonolith/fixturebot (153 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: rubymonolith

📝 Repository: rubymonolith/fixturebot

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Alexey-Lukin

📝 Repository: Alexey-Lukin/silken_net

📄 Descrizione: Silken Net: A decentralized Nature-as-a-Service (NaaS) platform. Bridges edge computing IoT sensors in forests with Polygon blockchain via an Oracle to mint Carbon and Forest Coins based on real-time biological telemetry and Lorentz attractor homeostasis.

item.description:
👤 Owner: Kenny421

📝 Repository: Kenny421/turbo_crud

📄 Descrizione: TurboCrud is a Rails gem that simplifies CRUD with Hotwire and Turbo. It provides modal and drawer forms, real-time updates, flash handling, and generators for fast setup. Works with existing apps or full scaffolds, boosting productivity and keeping your UI modern and responsive.
